description: Shared small-model profile registry for cli-devin and cli-opencode dispatch. Each model declares one or more executor paths with their provider + quota_pool, so the fallback engine can route across pools when one is exhausted. Active small-model rotation: SWE-1.6, DeepSeek-v4-pro, Kimi-k2.6, Qwen3.6, GLM-5.1, MiniMax (default via the MiniMax Token Plan provider `minimax-coding-plan` — MiniMax-M3-highspeed default, MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed fallback; pay-per-token Direct API via provider `minimax` retained as a selectable alternative), MiMo-V2.5-Pro (via the Xiaomi Token Plan Europe provider xiaomi-token-plan-ams; free opencode/mimo-v2.5-free sibling). Optional unverified separate-pool stubs: Claude Haiku, Gemini Flash.

executors.notes: Cognition free tier; no Pro quota burn. Default executor for SWE-1.6.

weaknesses: limited reasoning depth versus larger models

executors.notes: DeepSeek-v4-pro through Devin's Cognition Pro plan.
Direct DeepSeek API key (`DEEPSEEK_API_KEY`). Requires `--pure` flag; rejects tool names with `:`.
Through opencode-go provider credits (workspace-wide pool; 401 Insufficient balance when exhausted).
Kimi-k2.6 through Devin's Cognition Pro plan.
Through opencode-go provider credits. ~5–10% hang rate documented in cli-devin SKILL.md §3 (applies symmetrically here).

weaknesses: not the default for tight feedback loops

executors.notes: Only available through opencode-go provider credits. No Devin/Cognition path.

weaknesses: single executor path (no fallback if opencode-go exhausted)
needs tight scope and explicit file anchors

executors.notes: GLM-5.1 through Devin's Cognition Pro plan.

weaknesses: shared Cognition Pro pool when via cli-devin
shared opencode-go credit pool when via cli-opencode

executors.notes: Default MiniMax path. MiniMax Token Plan (subscription) via opencode provider `minimax-coding-plan`; Anthropic-compatible endpoint `https://api.minimax.io/anthropic/v1` (China: api.minimaxi.com). Live slug `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M3-highspeed`; verify availability with `opencode models minimax-coding-plan` (the live install confirms M2.7 ids; M3-highspeed is account-holder-directed). Omit `--agent` (rejected on opencode 1.15.13). Best prompt framework carried from MiniMax-2.7: TIDD-EC + dense pre-planning. --variant omitted by default.

capability.notes: Plain `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M3` confirmed live (2026-06-02); the `-highspeed` variant slug is account-holder-directed. agent_policy omit-general: `--agent` is rejected on opencode 1.15.13. format_mode json: dispatch via `opencode run --format json` for the normalized token/cost/latency envelope. default_variant high is the dispatch-layer default; `--variant` forwarding for this provider was historically omitted (unverified) — confirm acceptance before relying on a non-default variant.

strengths: subscription billing (no pay-per-token burn) via the MiniMax Token Plan
separate quota pool (minimax-token-plan) independent of cognition/opencode-go
responds well to guardrail-heavy framing (TIDD-EC) + dense pre-planning
weaknesses: MiniMax-M3-highspeed slug availability unverified on tier (fallback to minimax-2.7 highspeed)
subscription request budget resets on a 5-hour rolling window

executors.notes: Token Plan highspeed fallback for minimax-m3. Live slug `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed` (confirmed on opencode 1.15.13); standard `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.7` also resolves. Subscription billing. Omit `--agent`.

Pay-per-token Direct API (`MINIMAX_API_KEY`), platform endpoint `https://api.minimax.io/v1`. Selectable alternative when not using the Token Plan. The previously documented `minimax/MiniMax-M2.7` id errored on opencode 1.15.13 — confirm the live id with `opencode models minimax` before relying on this path.

capability.notes: Live slug `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed` confirmed on opencode 1.15.13; standard `minimax-coding-plan/MiniMax-M2.7` also resolves. agent_policy omit-general: `--agent` is rejected on this provider. format_mode json: dispatch via `opencode run --format json` for the normalized envelope. default_variant high is the dispatch-layer default; `--variant` forwarding for this provider was historically omitted (unverified) — confirm acceptance before relying on a non-default variant. Direct API path (provider `minimax`, quota_pool minimax-api) is a selectable pay-per-token alternative not covered by this capability default.

strengths: two executor paths: Token Plan highspeed (subscription) + Direct API (pay-per-token)
responds well to guardrail-heavy framing (TIDD-EC) + dense pre-planning
weaknesses: Direct API path is pay-as-you-go on large contexts

executors.notes: Xiaomi Token Plan (Europe) via opencode provider xiaomi-token-plan-ams (credential 'Xiaomi Token Plan (Europe)'). Live slug xiaomi-token-plan-ams/mimo-v2.5-pro (confirmed responsive on opencode 1.15.13, 2026-06-01); verify the full live list with 'opencode models xiaomi-token-plan-ams'. Omit --agent (warns + falls back on 1.15.13). Free cheap-iteration path: opencode/mimo-v2.5-free (opencode-go gateway, v2.5 tier). Context window 1,000,000 tokens (released 2026-04-22). OpenAI-compatible endpoint https://token-plan-ams.xiaomimimo.com/v1; opencode cost shows 0/0 (Token-Plan subscription). --variant maps to MiMo reasoning effort (low/medium/high) in opencode settings — always dispatch with --variant high (confirmed accepted on opencode 1.15.13). Best prompt framework (benchmark 004, 10/10 real runs): COSTAR or RACE + lean pre-planning — frame for format/brevity, not guardrails; TIDD-EC/dense ranked last; avoid CIDI (intermittent tool-only file-writes).

capability.notes: Live slug `xiaomi-token-plan-ams/mimo-v2.5-pro` confirmed responsive on opencode 1.15.13 (2026-06-01). default_variant high: `--variant` maps to MiMo reasoning effort (low/medium/high) and `--variant high` is confirmed accepted — always dispatch with it. agent_policy omit-general: `--agent` warns and falls back on 1.15.13. format_mode json: OpenAI-compatible endpoint; dispatch via `opencode run --format json` for the normalized envelope. Free cheap-iteration sibling `opencode/mimo-v2.5-free` (opencode-go gateway) is a separate path not covered by this capability default.

strengths: 1,000,000-token context window (largest in the small-model rotation)
strongly agentic — sustains 1000+ sequential tool calls (SWE-bench Pro 57.2)
token-efficient — 40-60% fewer tokens/trajectory vs frontier models (Opus 4.6 / Gemini 3.1 Pro / GPT-5.4)
Xiaomi Token Plan (Europe) subscription billing via provider xiaomi-token-plan-ams
separate quota pool (xiaomi-token-plan) independent of opencode-go / minimax / cognition pools
free cheap-iteration sibling available at opencode/mimo-v2.5-free
weaknesses: long-context quality degrades past ~512k despite the 1M window
prompt-framework benchmark 004 used 2 fixtures / single-sample — COSTAR vs RACE tie is within noise

executors.notes: Future small-model fallback candidate. Adoption blocked until quota-pool semantics verified.
Future small-model fallback candidate. Adoption blocked until quota-pool semantics verified.
